allow: PowerShell($c = Get-Command cmake -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\CMake\\bin\\cmake.exe','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\CMake\\bin\\cmake.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).FullName })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process MineCraftCPP -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "RUNNING \(pid $\($p.Id\)\) - close it to relink" } else { & 'C:\\Program Files\\CMake\\bin\\cmake.exe' --build build --config Debug 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6 })
